prompt: I want an agent that helps our team write better system prompts. It should analyze a draft prompt and suggest improvements following 2026 standards (XML structure, JSON schemas, failure modes, etc.).
assertions: The output includes a <role> block with a specific expert identity
The output includes a <output_format> section describing markdown or structured response
The output references 2026 standards (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, OpenAI, or similar)
The total system prompt is at least 4000 characters
The skill classifies the agent type (leaf/orchestrator/user-facing/hybrid)
